title: The Charitable and Religious Trusts Act, 1920
full_text: The Charitable and Religious Trusts Act, 1920 पूर्त और धार्मिक न्‍यास अधिनियम, 1920 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 192014 Act Number: 14 Enactment Date: 1920-03-20 Act Year: 1920 Short Title: The Charitable and Religious Trusts Act, 1920 Hindi Title: पूर्त और धार्मिक न्‍यास अधिनियम, 1920 Long Title: An Act to provide more effectual control over the administration of Charitable and Religious Trusts. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 20-03-1920 Last Updated: 26-11-2018 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Charitable and Religious Trusts Act, 1920 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. Interpretation. Section 3. Power to apply to the Court in respect of trusts of a charitable or religious nature. Section 4. Contents and verification of petition. Section 5. Procedure on petition. Section 6. Failure of trustee to comply with order under section 5 Section 7. Powers of trustee to apply for directions. Section 8. Costs of petition under this Act. Section 9. Savings. Section 10. Power of Courts as to costs in certain suits against trustees of charitable and religious trusts. Section 11. Provisions of the Code of Civil Procedure to apply. Section 12. Barring of appeals.
